name: Hittite Empire
note: The dominant Anatolian power of the Bronze Age. Their sudden collapse (~1180 BC) during the Bronze Age Collapse remains one of history's great mysteries.

figures.name: Suppiluliuma I
figures.significance: Brought the Hittite Empire to its peak; shattered Mitanni and rivaled Egypt

figures.name: Hattusili III
figures.significance: Signed the first recorded peace treaty with Egypt (Ramesses II), preserved on clay tablets
